title: KnY-Extra-Additions
description: Adds non-cannon content for Demon Slayer mod
body:
# KnY Extra Additions

A Forge addon mod for Kimetsu no Yaiba that adds custom breathing styles, nichirin swords, and demon slayer entities using the KimetsunoYaiba Tweaks API.

**This is an add-on for [Orca's Kimetsunoyaiba mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/kimetsunoyaiba), and it requires the [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks)**

**Minecraft:** 1.20.1 | **Forge:** 47.4.0+ | **Java:** 17

![The Frost Hashira sword can turn golden in its final form](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c74312263028da5ce00458741054408bc9a6c20.png)

## Features

### Custom Breathing Styles

- **Frost Breathing** - 7 forms with ice/snow effects
- **Ice Breathing** - 7 forms with freezing abilities
- **Alcohol Breathing** - 7 forms with intoxicating effects
- **Forest Breathing** - 6 forms with nature-based attacks

### Nichirin Swords

| Sword | Breathing Style | Category |
|-------|-----------------|----------|
| Nichirinsword Frost | Frost (6 forms) | Nichirin |
| Nichirinsword Komorebi | Frost (7 forms) | Special |
| Nichirinsword Golden | Golden Frost | Special (Hidden) |
| Nichirinsword Ice | Ice (6 forms) | Nichirin |
| Nichirinsword Shimizu | Ice (7 forms) | Special |
| Nichirinsword Alcohol | Alcohol | Nichirin |
| Nichirinsword Sakebito | Alcohol | Special |
| Nichirinsword Forest | Forest | Nichirin |
| Nichirinsword Shinrinsha | Forest | Special |

### Custom Entities

- **Setsu Komorebi** - Frost Breathing master with all 7 forms
- **Akira Shimizu** - Ice Breathing master with all 7 forms
- **Ice Slayer** - Generic Ice Breathing demon slayer
- **Frost Slayer** - Generic Frost Breathing demon slayer

### Projectile Entities

- **Thrown Sword** - Used by Frost Breathing 6th Form: Polar Mark

## Requirements

- Minecraft Forge 1.20.1 (47.4.0+)
- [Kimetsu no Yaiba](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/demonslayer) base mod
- [Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks) API mod
- GeckoLib 4.4.9

## Installation

1. Install Minecraft Forge 1.20.1
2. Download and install the Kimetsu no Yaiba base mod
3. Download and install Kimetsunoyaiba Tweaks from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/kimetsunoyaiba-tweaks)
4. Download KnY Extra Additions and place in your `mods` folder

## Usage

### Obtaining Swords

All nichirin swords are available in the **KnY Additions** creative tab. Hidden swords like the Golden Frost sword are obtained through gameplay mechanics (7th form transformation).
